memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Mode, u32 DigitalDataPathId, u32 MixerInOutDataType, int ConnectIData, int ConnectQData)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetSignalFlow

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
for the requested I or Q data.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is analog blocks that are connected to DigitalDataPath I.
is analog blocks that are connected to DigitalDataPath Q.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 NoOfDataPaths, u32 MixerInOutDataType, u32 Mode, u32 DataPathIndex[], u32 BlockIndex[])
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MB_R2C_C2R

briefdescription.para: Static API to setup Multiband configuration for C2C MixerInOutDataType.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in DigitalData Path.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in Analog Path(Data Converters).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 NoOfDataPaths, u32 MixerInOutDataType, u32 Mode, u32 DataPathIndex[], u32 BlockIndex[])
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MB_C2C

briefdescription.para: Static API to setup Multiband configuration for C2C MixerInOutDataType.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in DigitalData Path.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in Analog Path(Data Converters).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 MixerInOutDataType, u32 Mode, u32 DataPathIndex[], u32 BlockIndex[])
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SB_R2C_C2R

briefdescription.para: Static API to setup Singleband configuration for C2R and R2C MultiBandDataTypes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in DigitalData Path.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in Analog Path(Data Converters).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 MixerInOutDataType, u32 Mode, u32 DataPathIndex[], u32 BlockIndex[])
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SB_C2C

briefdescription.para: Static API to setup Singleband configuration for C2C MixerInOutDataType.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in DigitalData Path.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in Analog Path(Data Converters).

briefdescription.para: Static API to route QMC settings if switching to and from complex mode on alternate bodnout devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
0 for normal routing, 1 for IQ routing.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 NoOfDataPaths, u32 *ModePtr, u32 DataPathIndex[], u32 MixerInOutDataType)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_UpdateMBConfig

briefdescription.para: Static API to update mode and MultibandConfig.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is number of DataPaths enabled.
is a pointer to connection mode SB/MB_2X/MB_4X.
is the array that represents the blocks enabled in DigitalData Path.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 DigitalDataPathMask, u32 MixerInOutDataType, u32 DataConverterMask)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MultiBand

briefdescription.para: User-level API to setup multiband configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is the DataPath mask. First 4 bits represent 4 data paths, 1 means enabled and 0 means disabled.
is mixer data type, valid values are XRFDC_MB_DATATYPE_*
is block enabled mask (input/output driving blocks). 1 means enabled and 0 means disabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, int *ConnectedIData, int *ConnectedQData)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetConnectedIQData

briefdescription.para: Get Data Converter connected for digital data paths I & Q.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is Digital Data Path number.
is Digital Data Path number.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetConnectedIData

briefdescription.para: Get Data Converter connected for digital data path I.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is Digital Data Path number.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetConnectedQData

briefdescription.para: Get Data Converter connected for digital data path Q.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is Digital Data Path number.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, int ConnectedIData, int ConnectedQData)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetConnectedIQData

briefdescription.para: Set Data Converter connected for digital data path I and Q.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is Digital Data Path number.
is Converter Id to which DigitalPathI connected.
is Converter Id to which DigitalPathQ connected.
is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
